pundit.name: Landon Donovan
pundit.take: Look, I get why people say Bubba G is "all hat, no cattle," but right now he's riding high at the top of the standings even if France is doing all the heavy lifting for him. Switzerland facing Canada is almost poetic, given Mustard Boy's penchant for drafting safe picks like he's ordering the mildest curry on the menu. I'm sure Zach means well, but with Canada playing on home soil, I wouldn't put it past Bubba G to squeeze out another point, bringing that tally up to an almost unintentionally impressive 20. Meanwhile, Ghost Pepper's decision to draft Haiti is as spicy as a snow cone, and I feel for him, I really do. But when you're counting on Haiti to stage an upset against Morocco, you might as well be betting on ice in the desert. With Morocco looking strong, it's hard not to see that as another win for Gunner. And bless his heart, The Backpass Assassin is sliding into last place territory like he misread the match schedule. South Africa versus Korea Republic is the kind of matchup that feels like Devin and Gayden are playing rock-paper-scissors with mittens on, but in the end, Gayden's Japan and Korea combo is bound to pay off eventually. So I'll hedge my bets on Korea finding a way to snatch a result here.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy Zach's Brazil Set to Overwhelm Scotland in Miami
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach praying Scotland's kilts provide more defense than their backline.

pundit_takes.headline: Gayden's England Blanked by Ghana in Tactical Masterclass
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gayden claims first draw is the start of an unbeaten streak.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper Devin's Bosnia Expected to Sizzle Against Undrafted Qatar
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin banking on Bosnia to spice up his standings rank.

pundit_takes.headline: Rafe's Uzbekistan Crushed by Portugal, Noisemaker Strategy Falters
pundit_takes.subtitle: Rafe insists he's saving the best noise for later stages.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner leads despite back-to-back losses. How many more Ls can he handle?
Rafe's Tier-1 dependency screams rookie. Kid rides Germany like it's 1990.
Rafe and Gayden deadlocked at 0. Turkey dinner won't be harmonious.
Devin blindsides Gunner. The sim's favorite is allergic to winning predictions.
